_source: GameFAQs - Final Fantasy IX Walkthrough by bover_87 (https://gamefaqs.gamespot.com/ps/197338-final-fantasy-ix/faqs/71891/abilities)
intro: Catalogo de abilities de Final Fantasy IX. Action Abilities (gastan ATB en batalla) agrupadas por command; Support Abilities (siempre activas). Para cada ability listamos: command, MP cost, quien la usa, como se aprende, efecto resumido.

action_abilities.name: Steal
action_abilities.effect: Roba un item del enemigo. Util contra bosses para equips raros.

action_abilities.name: Flee
action_abilities.learn: Dagger, Mage Masher, Zorlin Shape, Ultima Weapon, Germinas Boots
action_abilities.effect: Huye de batalla (pierde algo de gil). Siempre funciona salvo en batallas inescapables.

action_abilities.name: Detect
action_abilities.effect: Muestra items robables del enemigo.

action_abilities.name: What's That?!
action_abilities.effect: Si exito, el party gana back attack contra el enemigo.

action_abilities.name: Soul Blade
action_abilities.effect: Inflinge el status de la Thief Sword equipada al enemigo con 100% accuracy. Broken con Sargatanas (Petrify).

action_abilities.name: Annoy
action_abilities.effect: Inflinge Trouble al enemigo.

action_abilities.name: Sacrifice
action_abilities.effect: K.O. self para restaurar HP/MP del party.

action_abilities.name: Lucky Seven
action_abilities.learn: Gladius, Exploda, Rune Tooth, The Tower, Thief Hat
action_abilities.effect: Si HP acaba en 7, hace 7/77/777/7777 damage al azar.

action_abilities.name: Thievery
action_abilities.effect: Ataque que hace 1 damage por Steal exitoso en el save. Cap 9999.

action_abilities.name: Fire / Fira / Firaga
action_abilities.learn: Mage Staff, Flame Staff, Octagon Rod / Flame Staff, Mage's Hat, Power Belt, Topaz / Octagon Rod
action_abilities.effect: Dano Fire elemental. 14/29/72 base power.

action_abilities.name: Blizzard / Blizzara / Blizzaga
action_abilities.learn: Leather Wrist / Ice Staff, Opal / Octagon Rod
action_abilities.effect: Dano Ice elemental. 14/29/72 base power.

action_abilities.name: Thunder / Thundara / Thundaga
action_abilities.learn: Silk Shirt, Glass Buckle / Lightning Staff, Peridot / Octagon Rod
action_abilities.effect: Dano Thunder elemental. 14/29/72 base power.

action_abilities.name: Bio
action_abilities.effect: 42 damage + Poison (20% accuracy). Funciona aunque falle Poison.

action_abilities.name: Osmose
action_abilities.effect: Drena MP del enemigo (15 power). En Undead, roba MP a Vivi.

action_abilities.name: Drain
action_abilities.effect: Drena HP (32 power). En Undead, roba HP a Vivi.

action_abilities.name: Demi
action_abilities.effect: Reduce HP del target en 1/4 max (40% accuracy). Falla contra bosses.

action_abilities.name: Comet
action_abilities.effect: Dano aleatorio non-elemental (56 power) ignorando defensa, 66% accuracy.

action_abilities.name: Death
action_abilities.effect: Inflinge KO (35% accuracy). Cura Undead a full HP.

action_abilities.name: Break
action_abilities.effect: Inflinge Petrify (40% accuracy).

action_abilities.name: Water
action_abilities.effect: Dano Water elemental (64 power) a uno o todos.

action_abilities.name: Meteor
action_abilities.effect: Dano aleatorio non-elemental (88 power) a todos. Falla segun Spirit.

action_abilities.name: Flare
action_abilities.effect: Dano extremo non-elemental (119 power) a un target.

action_abilities.name: Doomsday
action_abilities.effect: Dano extremo Shadow (112 power) a todos (aliados y enemigos).

action_abilities.name: Focus
action_abilities.effect: +25% Magic (max 99). Stackeable.

action_abilities.name: Darkside
action_abilities.effect: Dano Shadow heavy ignorando Mini/Protect. Cuesta 1/8 HP de Steiner.

action_abilities.name: Minus Strike
action_abilities.learn: Iron Sword, Excalibur II, Rubber Helm
action_abilities.effect: Dano igual a Max HP - HP actual de Steiner.

action_abilities.name: Iai Strike
action_abilities.effect: Inflinge KO (30% accuracy).

action_abilities.name: Power Break
action_abilities.effect: -25% Strength del enemigo (50% accuracy). Stackeable.

action_abilities.name: Armor Break
action_abilities.effect: Defense del enemigo a la mitad (50% accuracy). Stackeable.

action_abilities.name: Mental Break
action_abilities.effect: Magic Defense del enemigo a la mitad (50% accuracy). Stackeable.

action_abilities.name: Magic Break
action_abilities.effect: -25% Magic del enemigo (50% accuracy). Stackeable.

action_abilities.name: Charge!
action_abilities.effect: Todos los personajes en Critical HP atacan.

action_abilities.name: Thunder Slash
action_abilities.effect: BUGUEADA: solo 19% del max HP del enemigo. Ignorala salvo con patch.

action_abilities.name: Stock Break
action_abilities.effect: Dano heavy a todos los enemigos en el elemento del weapon equipado.

action_abilities.name: Climhazzard
action_abilities.effect: Dano magical no-elemental a todos. Mini y Shell en usuario lo reducen.

action_abilities.name: Shock
action_abilities.effect: Dano fisico extremo a un target en el elemento del weapon.

action_abilities.name: Shiva
action_abilities.effect: Dano Ice elemental medio (36 power) a todos.

action_abilities.name: Ifrit
action_abilities.effect: Dano Fire elemental medio (42 power) a todos.

action_abilities.name: Ramuh
action_abilities.effect: Dano Thunder elemental medio (32 power) a todos.

action_abilities.name: Atomos
action_abilities.effect: 30% del max HP a todos. +1% por Amethyst. Falla contra bosses.

action_abilities.name: Odin
action_abilities.effect: KO a todos (chance basada en Ore). Si no mata, ataque fisico (145 - Ore).

action_abilities.name: Leviathan
action_abilities.effect: Dano Water elemental heavy (59 power) a todos.

action_abilities.name: Bahamut
action_abilities.effect: Dano non-elemental heavy (88 power) a todos.

action_abilities.name: Ark
action_abilities.effect: Dano Shadow extremo (106 base). +1 power por Lapis Lazuli. El summon non-elemental mas fuerte del juego.

action_abilities.name: Fenrir
action_abilities.effect: Dano Earth medio (42 power) a todos. Si Eiko equipa Maiden Prayer, cambia a Wind (44 power).

action_abilities.name: Phoenix
action_abilities.effect: Revive todos los aliados KO + dano Fire medio (40 power) a todos. Auto-trigger si party muere y Eiko esta presente.

action_abilities.name: Carbuncle
action_abilities.effect: Buff al party. Tipo depende del Add-On equipado: Moonstone=Shell/Protect, Emerald=Haste, Diamond=Vanish, otro=Reflect.

action_abilities.name: Madeen
action_abilities.effect: Dano Holy heavy (71 base). +Level de Eiko al power. El summon Holy mas fuerte.

action_abilities.name: Cure / Cura / Curaga
action_abilities.learn: Rod, Magic Racket, Silk Shirt / Healing Rod, Golem's Flute, Barette / Wizard Rod, Whale Whisker, Hamelin, Angel's Flute
action_abilities.effect: Cura HP: 16/38/107 base power. Dano a Undead.

action_abilities.name: Life
action_abilities.learn: Mythril Rod, Healing Rod, Whale Whisker, Golem's Flute, Rebirth Ring, Cachusha
action_abilities.effect: Revive un aliado de KO. A Undead los deja en 1-digit HP.

action_abilities.name: Full-Life
action_abilities.effect: Revive un aliado de KO restaurando casi full HP. K.O. instantaneo a Undead.

action_abilities.name: Regen
action_abilities.effect: Regen status (regenera HP por turnos) a un target.

action_abilities.name: Esuna
action_abilities.learn: Fairy Flute, Siren's Flute, Angel's Flute, Rubber Suit
action_abilities.effect: Cura la mayoria de status (excepto KO, Doom, Zombie) en un target.

action_abilities.name: Haste
action_abilities.effect: Haste status (mas velocidad) a un target.

action_abilities.name: Dispel
action_abilities.effect: Remueve Shell, Protect, Haste, Reflect, Regen, Float, Vanish, Auto-Life.

action_abilities.name: Might
action_abilities.effect: +25% Strength (max 99). Stackeable.

action_abilities.name: Holy
action_abilities.effect: Dano Holy extremo (113 power) a un target.

action_abilities.name: Jump
action_abilities.effect: Salta, no targeteable. Al aterrizar, dano doble del weapon. -Killers no aplican a Jump.

action_abilities.name: Lancer
action_abilities.effect: 120% dano del weapon + drena 1/6 como MP.

action_abilities.name: Reis's Wind
action_abilities.learn: Mythril Spear, Holy Lance, Gold Helm, Angel Earrings
action_abilities.effect: Regen status a todos los aliados.

action_abilities.name: White Draw
action_abilities.effect: Drena MP del enemigo y restaura MP de todos.

action_abilities.name: Cherry Blossom
action_abilities.effect: 150% dano del weapon a un target. Sin delay.

action_abilities.name: Dragon's Crest
action_abilities.effect: Dano = (dragones matados)^2 a un enemigo. Mata 100+ para 9999.

action_abilities.name: Eat
action_abilities.effect: Come al enemigo si HP <= 25%. Aprende su Blue Magic. Sin skill, KO al enemigo.

action_abilities.name: 1000 Needles
action_abilities.effect: 1000 dano fijo non-elemental a un target.

action_abilities.name: Limit Glove
action_abilities.learn: Axe Beak, Mu, Mandragora, Blazer Beetle, Jabberwock, Catoblepas (Eat)
action_abilities.effect: Si HP de Quina = 1, 9999 dano. Si HP > 1, falla.

action_abilities.name: Mighty Guard
action_abilities.effect: Protect + Shell a todos los aliados.

action_abilities.name: Matra Magic
action_abilities.learn: Dragonfly, Trick Sparrow, Ogre, Land Worm (Eat)
action_abilities.effect: Reduce HP del target a 1 (20% accuracy). Ideal antes de Eat.

action_abilities.name: Bad Breath
action_abilities.effect: Confuse + Darkness + Poison + Slow + Mini (40% accuracy) a un enemigo.

action_abilities.name: Frog Drop
action_abilities.effect: Dano = nivel x ranas atrapadas. Muy high si atrapaste muchas.

action_abilities.name: White Wind
action_abilities.effect: Cura todos por 1/3 del max HP de Quina.

action_abilities.name: Doom (Blue)
action_abilities.effect: Doom status a un target (25% accuracy).

action_abilities.name: Roulette
action_abilities.effect: KO unblockable random (puede pegar a aliados o caster).

action_abilities.name: Aqua Breath
action_abilities.effect: 25% max HP Water elemental a todos. Falla contra bosses.

action_abilities.name: LV5 Death
action_abilities.effect: KO a todos los enemigos con nivel multiplo de 5.

action_abilities.name: LV4 Holy
action_abilities.effect: 34 power Holy a todos los enemigos nivel multiplo de 4.

action_abilities.name: LV3 Def-less
action_abilities.learn: Carve Spider, Lamia, Lizard Man, Sand Scorpion, Ochu, Grand Dragon (Eat)
action_abilities.effect: Reduce Defense y Magic Defense de enemigos nivel multiplo de 3.

action_abilities.name: Pumpkin Head
action_abilities.learn: Hedgehog Pie, Python, Ladybird, Skeleton, Yeti, Basilisk, Bandersnatch (Eat)
action_abilities.effect: Dano = max HP - HP actual de Quina.

action_abilities.name: 1000 Needles
action_abilities.effect: 1000 dano fijo. Util contra bosses con mucha defensa.

action_abilities.name: Night
action_abilities.effect: Sleep status a TODOS (aliados y enemigos).

action_abilities.name: Twister
action_abilities.effect: Dano aleatorio Wind a todos. Cap = (level + Magic) x 55.

action_abilities.name: Earth Shake
action_abilities.effect: 75 power Earth elemental a todos.

action_abilities.name: Angel's Snack
action_abilities.effect: Usa un Remedy en cada aliado. Sin Remedies, pierde el turno.

action_abilities.name: Frost
action_abilities.effect: Freeze status (30% accuracy).

action_abilities.name: Vanish (Blue)
action_abilities.effect: Vanish status a un target.

action_abilities.name: Mustard Bomb
action_abilities.effect: Heat status (30% accuracy).

action_abilities.name: Magic Hammer
action_abilities.effect: Drena MP del target (hasta HP actual del target).

action_abilities.name: Throw
action_abilities.effect: Lanza un item (Pinwheel, Rising Sun, Wing Edge) como arma de rango.

action_abilities.name: Chakra
action_abilities.effect: Restaura propio HP/MP.

action_abilities.name: Spare Change
action_abilities.effect: Cambia ATB entre aliados.

action_abilities.name: Counter
action_abilities.effect: Counterattack automatico cuando es atacado fisicamente.

action_abilities.name: Aura
action_abilities.effect: Hace a Amarant invencible fisicamente (1 ataque) y +50% damage siguiente.

action_abilities.name: No Mercy
action_abilities.effect: Counter + daño heavy al contraatacar.

action_abilities.name: Curse
action_abilities.effect: Si contraataca, inflict status random al atacante.

action_abilities.name: Revive
action_abilities.effect: Si contraataca, revive un aliado KO.

action_abilities.name: Demi Shock
action_abilities.effect: Counter + reduce HP del atacante en 1/4.

action_abilities.name: Countdown
action_abilities.effect: 10 turnos: el proximo ataque de Amarante mata instantaneamente.

support_abilities.name: Auto-Medal
support_abilities.effect: Auto-revive con 1 HP la primera vez que cae KO.

support_abilities.name: Boost
support_abilities.effect: Summons siempre usan animacion larga (33% mas fuerte).

support_abilities.name: Healer
support_abilities.effect: Ataques curan al aliado (en lugar de dano).

support_abilities.name: Add Status
support_abilities.effect: Agrega chance de status segun el weapon equipado.

support_abilities.name: Body Temp
support_abilities.effect: Inmune a Freeze, Heat, Freeze status.
